title: Logging In
purpose: Authenticate as an organisation admin and open the admin dashboard.
outcome: Signed in; land on Admin Dashboard.
steps: Open http://localhost:3001/?org=platform-demo | Enter Email address | Enter Password | Click Sign in

title: Understanding the Navigation
purpose: Reach all admin modules from the sidebar.
outcome: User knows menu items: Dashboard, Users, Directory, Org Chart, Calendar, Tasks, Reports, Performance, Announcements, Tickets, Knowledge Centre, Partnerships, Settings, Health & Safety, Activity Log.
steps: Use left sidebar to open each area as needed

title: Switching Admin / Employee View
purpose: Preview the product as an employee without losing admin access.
outcome: View toggles between Admin and Employee.
steps: Top bar: locate Admin / Employee toggle | Click Employee or Admin

title: Dashboard Components
purpose: See org-wide activity and risks at a glance.
outcome: Read activity feed, movements, task summary, celebrations, training gaps, quick links.
steps: After login remain on Dashboard | Scroll to review widgets

title: Using Quick Actions
purpose: Jump to common work from the dashboard.
outcome: New user flow, task list, or employee profile opens.
steps: Click Add new user OR View all tasks OR click a celebration card

title: Viewing the User List
outcome: Filtered or searched list of employees.
steps: Sidebar: Users | Use search bar | Apply filters: department, division, status, access level | Click employee name

title: Creating a New User
purpose: Add an employee record and optionally invite them.
outcome: User created; system may prompt to send invitation email.
steps: Users | Add User | Complete fields | Save | Follow invitation prompt if shown
form_data: Required: First name; Last name; Email address (work); Country (e.g. United Kingdom); Access level (Organisation Admin, Manager, or UK Employee). Optional: Department; Division; Job title; Employee number; Date of birth; Gender; Marital status; Phone numbers; Address

title: Editing a User Profile
purpose: Maintain accurate HR, pay, leave, and compliance data.
steps: Users | Click employee | Tabs: Personal, Employment, Pay, Leave, Documents, Emergency contacts, Notes, Training, Health & Safety | Edit on a section | Save
form_data: Tab-specific fields as shown in UI

title: Inviting a User
outcome: Invitation email with secure link sent.
steps: Users | Open user profile | Click Send Invitation (when shown)
form_data: Uses profile email; no separate form in guide

title: Suspending or Removing a User
purpose: Block access or start leaver process.
outcome: Suspended and/or offboarding started with checklist.
steps: Open user profile | Suspend and/or Offboard | When prompted: enter leaving date and termination reason

title: Using the Directory
purpose: Look up colleagues and open profiles.
steps: Directory | Browse or search | Click person

title: Viewing the Org Chart
steps: Org Chart (or Directory > Org Chart) | Click nodes to expand/collapse | Use zoom controls

title: Company Calendar
purpose: See leave, holidays, and milestones org-wide.
outcome: Calendar with entry details on demand.
steps: Calendar | Month/week toggle | Filter by department, team, or individual | Click entry for details

title: Viewing Tasks
steps: Tasks | Filter by status (Open, In Progress, Completed), priority, category, assignee

title: Creating a New Task
purpose: Assign tracked work with ownership and deadline.
outcome: New task in list; optional onboarding user link.
steps: Tasks | Create Task | Fill form | Optionally link onboarding user | Save
form_data: Title; Category: Onboarding, Compliance, Training, or Administrative; Priority: Low, Medium, High, Urgent; Due date; Assignees (one or more); optional onboarding user link

title: Updating Task Status
steps: Open task | Status dropdown: Open, In Progress, Completed | Add comments

title: Viewing Leave Requests
purpose: See who is off and per-person history.
outcome: Calendar overview and/or user Leave tab.
steps: Calendar and/or Users | user | Leave tab

title: Approving or Rejecting Leave
outcome: Request approved or rejected; employee notified.
steps: Open Pending request | Review dates, type, duration | Approve OR Reject | If Reject: provide reason

title: Configuring Leave Policies
steps: Settings > Time & Leave | Manage Holidays, Leave policies, Approval workflows | Per policy: accrual type/frequency/days, carryover, caps, Bradford Factor (sick)

title: Managing Working Patterns
purpose: Align leave calculations with working weeks.
steps: Settings > Time & Leave | Define patterns | Assign to employees

title: Performance Overview
steps: Performance | Review Active review cycles, Review templates, 360 feedback requests

title: Managing Review Cycles
steps: Performance | Select cycle | View instances and completion % | Open a review

title: Creating a New Review Cycle
purpose: Launch review period for applicable pairs.
steps: Performance | Create Cycle | Select template | Cycle name, start date, end date | Launch
form_data: Template; cycle name; start date; end date

title: Managing Review Templates
steps: Performance | Templates | Create/edit | Sections/questions: Text, Scale 1-5, Multiple choice, Two-axis graph
form_data: Template name; section/question content and types

title: 360 Feedback
steps: Performance | 360 Feedback Requests | Inspect subject, reviewers, template

title: Viewing Announcements
steps: Announcements | View published, draft, scheduled

title: Creating an Announcement
steps: Announcements | Create Announcement | Publish or save draft
form_data: Title; Body (rich text); Priority (normal or high); Audience (all or filtered by team/division/country); Pin toggle

title: Editing or Removing Announcements
steps: Open announcement | Edit | Unpublish or delete as needed

title: Ticket Inbox Overview
steps: Tickets | Filter by status, category, assignee

title: Responding to a Ticket
steps: Open ticket | Read thread | Type reply | Send | Optionally Assign, Change status, Change priority, Escalate to partner admin
form_data: Reply text; status/priority/assignee; escalation if applicable

title: Managing Ticket Categories
steps: Settings > Integrations & Data | Ticket Categories | Add, edit, remove

title: Creating Ticket (Admin Inbox) — UI verified
purpose: Create ticket from org admin tickets area.
steps: Tickets | Open New Ticket modal | Fill fields | Create Ticket
form_data: Subject (required); Category (optional None); Priority (Low, Medium, High, Urgent); Description (required). Buttons: Cancel; Create Ticket / Creating…
notes: Verified apps/admin-web tickets page. Modal title New Ticket.

title: Managing Articles
outcome: View published and draft by category.
steps: Knowledge Centre | Browse by category

title: Creating a New Article
steps: Knowledge Centre | Create Article | Save
form_data: Title; Category; Content (rich text); Published or Draft

title: Editing and Organising Articles
steps: Open article | Edit content, category, status | Save per UI

title: Reports Hub
steps: Reports | Saved reports / Favourites / Ad-hoc reports

title: Available Report Types (reference)
steps: Main Reports /reports | Headcount /headcount | Additions & Terminations /additions-terminations | Turnover /turnover | Bradford Factor /bradford-factor

title: Running a Report
purpose: Produce dataset for period and cohort.
steps: Open report | Set date range and filters | Export where available
form_data: Date range; department, division, country, etc.; export format

title: Headcount Report
steps: Reports | Headcount | Breakdowns | Export

title: Bradford Factor
steps: Bradford Factor | Filter by policy and period

title: Accessing Settings
steps: Settings

title: Settings Categories (reference)
steps: Read guide table: Organisation; People & Access; Pay & Benefits; Time & Leave; Hiring & Lifecycle; Learning & Development; Health & Safety; Integrations & Data; Account & Billing

title: Configuring Departments
steps: Settings > Organisation > Departments | Add Department or open existing | Rename or deactivate
form_data: Department name; active flag if applicable

title: Managing Access Levels
steps: Settings > People & Access > Access Levels | Configure Organisation Admin, Manager, UK Employee

title: Configuring Onboarding Task Lists
steps: Settings > Hiring & Lifecycle > Onboarding | Add/reorder items
form_data: Per item: Title; Description; Lead time (days before/after start); Priority; Assignee role

title: Configuring Offboarding Task Lists
steps: Settings > Hiring & Lifecycle > Offboarding | Define checklist items

title: General Settings
steps: Settings > Account & Billing > General Settings | Save
form_data: Date format; Number format; Timezone; Default country; Display name format; Industry; Employee self-service options (photo upload, file upload, expanded gender options)

title: Roles (Organisational Roles)
purpose: Group people for routing and visibility.
steps: Settings > People & Access > Roles | Assign employees

title: Activity Log
steps: Activity Log | Filter by date, user, action type

title: Access History
steps: Access History (Audit & Logs area)

title: Import History
steps: Import History (Audit & Logs area)
